notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter strikes out swinging, catcher Austin Wells to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith grounds out, first baseman Paul Goldschmidt to pitcher David Bednar.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Hao-Yu Lee singles on a line drive to right fielder Jasson Domínguez. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd. Hao-Yu Lee to 2nd. Spencer Torkelson advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Jasson Domínguez.
